creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG

  Log:
  Remove expired ports
  
  2011-11-27 japanese/pycodec-zope: Handled in Python-2.4 upwards
  2011-11-27 japanese/zope-ejsplitter: Plone4 has newer and better splitter mechanism than ejSplitter
  2011-11-27 japanese/zope-jamailhost: Zope has changed MailHost specification and it is not sure jaMailHost works well
  
  PR:             ports/162055
  Submitted by:   rm
  Feature safe:   yes
